code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line1 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 1")?
  let line2 = io.read_line().ok_or("missing line 2")?
  let a = string.split_whitespace(line1)
  let b = string.split_whitespace(line2)
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let sa = a.get(i).ok_or("oob")?
    let sb = b.get(i).ok_or("oob")?
    let ia = string.parse_int(sa).ok_or("bad int")?
    let ib = string.parse_int(sb).ok_or("bad int")?
    let s = ia + ib
    println("#{ia}+#{ib}=#{s}")
    i = i + 1
  end
  Ok(())
end
